RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT J.B. PLUMBING COMPANY'S Motion For A Protective Order & For Sanctions is denied as moot. Motion to compel the deposition was granted on December 11, 2013. Judge Pro Tem: David May; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Deposition Of Pltf And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-11-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Matt Watts, Esq. of Bragg & Kuluva, Tel. 415.273.6500, for defendants and moving party;
Michael W. Spalding, Esq. of Hedani Choy Spalding & Salvagione, Tel. 415.892.4848, for defendants Lind Plumbing, via court call.

RULING: The parties stipulated to the Pro Tem Judge. The matter was discussed. After hearing, the Court modified its tentative ruling on DEFENDANT LA GALLERIA CONDOMINIUM OWNERS' ASSOCIATION, HILL & COMPANY REAL ESTATE INC. and HILL & CO PROPERTY MANGEMENT, INC.'S Motion To Compel Deposition Of Plaintiff And Request For Sanctions as follows: The motion to compel deposition of J.B. Lind's person most knowledgeable is granted. The limitation on taking more than one deposition from a natural person does not apply where that person is also the person most knowledgeable. CCP 2025.230; 2025.610(c)(1); Weil & Brown 8:482. Lind's counsel has not cited any authority to the contrary. Request for sanction is denied. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Thomas Cohen; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
